metadata.name: Handle a Space Debris Conjunction Alert

description: A satellite operator receives an alert that their satellite has a high probability of colliding with a piece of space debris. They must decide whether to perform a collision avoidance maneuver.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the conjunction data message (CDM) to determine the probability of collision, miss distance, and time of closest approach.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the probability of collision is high (1 in 1,000).

nodes.task_description: Plan a collision avoidance maneuver (a small thruster burn) to move the satellite out of the path of the debris.

expected_outcome.value: Agent designs a maneuver that increases the miss distance to a safe level.

nodes.task_description: Execute the maneuver and verify the satellite is on its new, safer trajectory.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the command for the burn and confirms the satellite's new orbit.
